---
title: "Andreas Bogossian"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.webp
  image-alt: "Andreas Bogossian"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AJBogo9
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bogo9/
    - text: Blog
      href: blog.qmd
    - text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta name="description" content="MSc student in Machine Learning, Data Science and AI at Aalto University. I write about ML, statistics, and algorithms.">
    <link rel="preload" as="image" href="profile.webp">
listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 3
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
---

MSc student in Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at Aalto University, with a minor in Operations Research. Previously completed a BSc in Computer Science with a minor in Mathematics.

My research interests lie at the intersection of machine learning and mathematics. I write about technical concepts in ML, statistics and algorithms with the goal of building deep understanding through writing about concepts I don't yet understand.

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
